titleStmt.title: SII 17.254: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 254. (A.R. No. 232 of 1904.) ŚIṄGAVARAM, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the central shrine in the ruined Ādivarāha Perumāḷ temple.
This inscription mentions Dēvarāya-Mahārāya as the father of Mallikārjunadēva. The details of date given viz., Śaka 1378, Dhātu, Makara ba. 2, Wednesday, Magha, correspond to 1457 A.D., January 12.

It records the making over of Maṇavāḷakōṉ, Tiruvēggaḍamuḍaiyāṉ, Veṉṟumālaiiṭṭa Perumāḷ and Timmaṇaṉ as tiruviḷakkukkuḍi to the god Paṉṟi Āḻvār in Śiṅgapuram in Śeñjippaṟṟu in Śiṅgapura-vaḷanāḍu in Palkuṉṟakkōṭṭam, by Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyāṉ Śūrappa-vēḷāṉ, who was carrying on the śadamaṇadamCompare A.R. Ep., 1952-53. Int., p. 16.in PaḍaivIḍurājyam. It was stipulated that this mudukuḍi was to pay 3 paṇams annually for the sacred lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭalicuraṉ Ariyarāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ Irājātirāja Irāyaparamecuraṉ śrīvīrappiṟatāpa kecaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya tevarāya makārāyar kumārar mallikāṟcuṉa tevamakārāyar piṟutu viy rā
(yirā)ccayam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakarttam 1000 3 100 7 10 8 l mel cellāniṉṟa tātu varuṣattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakkiṣattu tutikaiyum putavāramum peṟṟa matattuRead maº.nāḷ palkuṉṟak koṭṭattu ciṅkapura vaḷanāṭṭu ceñcippaṟṟu ciṅkapuram perumāḷ paṉṟi Āḻ vār ciṟīpaṇṭārattu
kku paṭaivīṭṭirājyam cātamaṇatamCompare A.R. Ep., 1952-53. Int., p. 16.naṭattum tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ cūrappaveḷāṉ taṉmacātaṉam kuṭuttapaṭi maṇavāḷakoṉ
tiruveṅkiṭa muṭaiyāṉ veṉṟumālaiiṭṭaperumāḷ timmaṇaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārai tiruviḷa kku kuṭi Āka viṭukaiyil Immutukuṭi
varuṣam Oṉṟukku tiruviḷakkukku Iṟukkum �3 paṇamuṉṟum Iṟuttu cantiṟātitta varaiyum Ivvemperumāṉukku
tiruviḷakkukku Iṟukka kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Inta taṉmattukku Atikam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ Uṇṭāṉāl
keṅkaikkaraiyile kovatai kuruvatai piṟumma vatai ceytavaṉ poṉa pāvattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷ
ivai cūrappaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.254 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
